yaml.description: Page spec YAML to lint. Provide this or filePath or directory.

filePath.description: Absolute path to YAML spec file.

directory.description: Absolute path to a directory. Recursively lints all .yaml files. Returns per-file results sorted by issue count (most issues first).

checks.description: Comma-separated check IDs (e.g. 'V1,V3'). Omit for all. Only filters visual checks — structural validation always runs.
